creator: martin@svenskabutiker.se
text:
I hade the same problem when compiling yesterday. I ran pkg_delete auto* in 
/var/db/pkg and then returned to build kde2 wich then worked OK.

The strange thing was that all my ports were at their latest versions when I
ran pkg_info -v 

--
